race.description: Ted Harvey Memorial 2026 Battle Of The Bush Emerald Qualifier Open Hcp
race.comment: ESTE DIA (4) produced a good effort when narrowly defeated last time at Jandowae over 1200m. Winning chance. IMAGINE THAT (7) finished third two runs back but didn't measure up last time over 1075m at Thangool, finishing 5.5 lengths back in eighth. Finds the right race this time and can bounce back. JUST SUPER (2) has been in the market at his last couple of runs but failed to threaten, the latest effort a modest sixth at Longreach over 1200m. Worth another chance. FINE SHOT (5) returns after a break of five-and-a-half months. Excels when fresh with four wins from as many starts including a win over 1200m at Rockhampton at the start of last prep. Makes plenty of appeal.
